untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Shadow height divided by breakout price compared to median shadow height threshold — median calculation and breakout price reference are not available in allowed indicators; (2) Context-dependent direction logic that differentiates bull vs bear market performance requires market regime detection beyond allowed regimes; (3) Volume trend reference to Table 24.4 not provided; (4) Specific median shadow height threshold value not quantified in source text.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture doji pattern basics (small body_pct < 0.1 and upper_wick > lower_wick as indicator of tall upper shadow). Exit targets (52 and 49) are hardcoded from source example but are not generalizable without the median shadow height calculation. The core pattern requires normalized shadow-to-price ratio comparison which cannot be expressed with available indicators.
